parameters: The collars around our necks can only be taken off with permission
They won't give it no matter how many times we ask. Our only
hope is for Sarasa and her friends to come through for us.
Micchan! I washed your nail bat for ya! It's sparklin' clean now!
Micchan! Want some red tape to put on your Magic Unit?
I bet it'd look really cool!
Class C came pickin' a fight durin' class! Let's go make it
Micchan! Class B's movin' in on our territory! Come on, let's go
This style's from the Bohelos market! I found it in an Aubade book!
I couldn't read the words, but I understood the vibe! The scream of a
P-Please, no more... I was just following orders from Maximus...
